hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); f.endswith('.py') and [subprocess.run(['uv','run','ruff','check','--fix',f]), subprocess.run(['uv','run','ruff','format',f])]" 2>/dev/null || true

python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); import os; exit(1) if os.path.basename(f) == '.env' else None" || echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":".env の直接編集は禁止"}'
